programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Andrew and James aim to provide 'boutique on a budget' at the Rose and Crown, near Bolton. But they only have eight months of B&B experience, and their rivals are quick to pick faults..

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Nigel and Pok U host at their B&B and Cantonese restaurant, the Bingham Townhouse, in Nottinghamshire. But there are single-bed grumbles and problems at breakfast.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Kev and Tor host meditation and mindfulness breaks on their narrowboat, Spirited Away, near Rugby. But their guests aren't impressed by the communal living and diminutive facilities.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: There's tension, tears and tough talk as the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid, before the winner is announced.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Dog lover Kerry keeps her food simple and her welcome extravagant, with a Welsh choir awaiting her guests in her driveway. But a canine criticism leaves a bad taste.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Foodie Dave hopes to impress with home-grown herbs, hand-picked fruit and technical expertise, on a night featuring toilet inspections and rollercoaster revelations.
